query: heavy film grain noise analog photograph high ISO texture
message: sub:film_artifacts/grain — anti_aesthetic — heavy grain, high-ISO noise, push-processed analog texture

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up black and white portrait of a woman framed from the upper forehead to just below the chin. Her eyes are open and gaze directly at the viewer beneath arched eyebrows. Her nose and lips are centered in the frame. Light falls across the front of her face while the left and right edges fade into deep shadow. Dark hair is visible along the sides of the frame.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An extreme close-up black and white portrait of a woman covered in heavy film grain, framed from the upper forehead to just below the chin. Her eyes are open and gaze directly at the viewer beneath arched eyebrows. Her nose and lips are centered in the frame. Light falls across the front of her face while the left and right edges fade into deep shadow. Dark hair is visible along the sides. The entire image has a pronounced coarse, granular texture that evokes high-speed analog film, giving the photograph a raw, tactile, archival quality.
